events.title: Beach Party, Hiking & Protein Coffee with Sama
events.title_fa: مهمونی ساحلی، پیاده‌روی و قهوه‌ی پروتئینی با ساما
events.location: Venice Beach, Windward Plaza, Los Angeles, CA
events.description: Beach party, hiking, and protein coffee with Sama — hosted by Caspian Coast Coffee. Meet at Windward Plaza, Venice Beach. ☕️After the walk, we will go together to Caspian Cafe to meet, socialize, and of course, you can try the "Sama special protein coffee"! 😎

events.title: Weekend Backgammon (تخته) & Reading
events.location: Caspian Coast Coffee, 1501 Main St Unit 103, Venice, CA 90291
events.description: Read a book or play Backgammon (تخته) with friends in the Caspian Loft. Slow mornings, good coffee, no rush. Get comfortable, relax, and stay a while.

events.title: Coffee & Learn
events.location: Caspian Coast Coffee, 1501 Main St Unit 103, Venice, CA 90291
events.description: Come for a casual and informative coffee chat about business, real estate, and financial growth. Whether you’re looking to grow your small business, thinking about starting one, have questions about real estate, need banking tips, or simply want to connect with like-minded people over an amazing cup of coffee, we’d love to see you there.
